title: Enable/Disable Polygon (Disable)
text: Enable/Disable Polygon (Disable) Determines whether the polygon is enabled for the user to click. By default, the polygon is enabled. Disable = " False | True " Value Description False (default) The polygon is enabled. True The polygon is disabled. To enable or disable a polygon declaratively, select or clear the Enable check box in the Define Polygons dialog. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(MAP) = "disable=false" Copy Applies To umap (Map) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
